description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden storage box constructed from horizontal planks with visible wood grain and natural weathering. The box is reinforced with two thick vertical wooden bands on each long side, providing structural support and a rustic appearance. The wood shows signs of aging, with some discoloration and minor surface imperfections, suggesting it is suitable for outdoor or utility use. The top surface is flat and made from the same planked wood, with no visible hinges, handles, or locking mechanisms. The ends of the box are plain, with the wood grain running vertically, and there are no decorative elements or labels. The overall build is robust, making it ideal for storing tools, equipment, or other items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or backyards.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage box with reinforced vertical bands and a flat, plank-style top. Its rustic, sturdy design is suitable for outdoor or utility storage.
description_view_0: The long side of the box is visible, showing horizontal planks and two thick vertical reinforcement bands.
description_view_1: The short end of the box is visible, displaying vertically aligned planks and no reinforcement bands.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is shown, identical to view 0 with horizontal planks and two vertical bands.
description_view_3: The opposite short end is visible, similar to view 1 with vertical planks and no bands.
